title: Ex-US congressman says Army source told him of ‘aliens breeding with humans’ in secret sites
summary_full: Former congressman Matt Gaetz claims he was told of a secret programme involving alien-human hybrids, allegedly described to him by a US Army official. He offers no evidence and admits he did not verify the account. The claim, emerging in a politically charged context, has drawn widespread scepticism and underscores the persistent gap between extraordinary assertions and substantiated fact.
